mapper.select: SELECT u.id, u.username, u.password, u.name, u.email, u.role_id, r.role_code, u.status, u.last_login_at, u.deleted FROM `user` u INNER JOIN role r ON u.role_id = r.id AND r.deleted = 0 WHERE u.username = #{username} AND u.deleted = 0

SELECT u.id, u.username, u.password, u.name, u.email, u.role_id, r.role_code, u.status, u.last_login_at, u.deleted FROM user u INNER JOIN role r ON u.role_id = r.id AND r.deleted = 0 WHERE u.username = #{username} AND u.deleted = 0

SELECT u.id, u.username, u.password, u.name, u.email, u.role_id, r.role_code, u.status, u.last_login_at, u.deleted FROM "user" u INNER JOIN role r ON u.role_id = r.id AND r.deleted = 0 WHERE u.username = #{username} AND u.deleted = 0

SELECT u.id, u.username, u.password, u.name, u.email, u.role_id, r.role_code, u.status, u.last_login_at, u.deleted FROM `user` u INNER JOIN role r ON u.role_id = r.id AND r.deleted = 0 WHERE u.id = #{userId} AND u.deleted = 0

SELECT u.id, u.username, u.password, u.name, u.email, u.role_id, r.role_code, u.status, u.last_login_at, u.deleted FROM user u INNER JOIN role r ON u.role_id = r.id AND r.deleted = 0 WHERE u.id = #{userId} AND u.deleted = 0

SELECT u.id, u.username, u.password, u.name, u.email, u.role_id, r.role_code, u.status, u.last_login_at, u.deleted FROM "user" u INNER JOIN role r ON u.role_id = r.id AND r.deleted = 0 WHERE u.id = #{userId} AND u.deleted = 0
SELECT p.permission_code FROM permission p INNER JOIN role_permission rp ON p.id = rp.permission_id WHERE rp.role_id = #{roleId} AND p.deleted = 0 ORDER BY p.permission_code
mapper.update: UPDATE `user` SET last_login_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE user SET last_login_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE "user" SET last_login_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE `user` SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE user SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE "user" SET status = #{status}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO jwt_refresh_token ( user_id, refresh_token, expires_at, revoked, user_agent, ip_address, created_at, deleted ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{refreshToken}, #{expiresAt}, 0, #{userAgent}, #{ipAddress}, NOW(), 0 )
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, refresh_token, expires_at, revoked, user_agent, ip_address, created_at, deleted FROM jwt_refresh_token WHERE refresh_token = #{refreshToken} AND deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE jwt_refresh_token SET revoked = 1 WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND revoked = 0 AND deleted = 0
UPDATE jwt_refresh_token SET revoked = 1 WHERE refresh_token = #{refreshToken} AND deleted = 0
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM jwt_refresh_token WHERE expires_at < NOW() OR revoked = 1
